name: dxtrace
description: Kanıta kilitli, çelişki denetimli ve doktor onaylı klinik LLM platformu

scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n "API,WEB" -c "blue,cyan" "nodemon src/server.js" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:mobile: concurrently -n "API,MOBILE" -c "blue,magenta" "nodemon src/server.js" "cd mobile && npx expo start"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "API,WEB,MOBILE" -c "blue,cyan,magenta" "nodemon src/server.js" "cd client && npm run dev" "cd mobile && npx expo start"

author: DxTrace Team
